safe_resolutions.invalid_schema: Retry with cs.policy_input.vs3.v0 derived from trusted RequestContext fields.
safe_resolutions.cross_tenant_scope: Use an explicit tenant-safe reference or approved promotion path.
safe_resolutions.role_not_allowed: Request a role or workspace grant through the owner approval path.
safe_resolutions.revoked_principal: Re-authenticate after membership is restored by an owner.
safe_resolutions.high_risk_requires_approval: Run dry-run and collect the required approval before execution.
safe_resolutions.secret_classification_denied: Use a lower-sensitivity evidence path or request explicit policy approval.
safe_resolutions.mission_authority_required: Activate a mission or workspace grant before using this capability.
safe_resolutions.data_scope_denied: Limit the operation to the approved workspace or namespace scope.
safe_resolutions.workspace_mode_denied: Use an internal workspace mode or collect explicit external-mode approval.
safe_resolutions.connectorhub_capability_required: Route the capability through ConnectorHub with a declared manifest grant.
safe_resolutions.model_policy_denied: Use an approved local/internal model route with an allowed sensitivity.
safe_resolutions.unexpected_authoritative_attribute: Remove caller-supplied authority fields and derive them from trusted stores.
safe_resolutions.unknown_policy_default_deny: Select a known policy path or install a reviewed bundle.
safe_resolutions.policy_revision_mismatch: Reload the active bundle and retry after cache invalidation.
safe_resolutions.opa_unavailable_fail_closed: Restore the policy service or keep protected operations denied.
safe_resolutions.invalid_bundle_rejected: Fix bundle syntax or compatibility and keep last known good active.
